description: Employee repeatedly submitted taxi receipts with identical amounts across different dates
Finance manager approved payments to a vendor owned by a relative
Multiple cash deposits just below $10000 reporting threshold across different branches
Ghost employees added to payroll with salaries redirected to one bank account
Vendor submitted duplicate invoices with slight variations in invoice numbers
Unusual spike in refunds processed by a single cashier
Large international wire transfers to high-risk jurisdictions with no clear business purpose
Round dollar payments made repeatedly to the same offshore account
Employee altered vendor bank details leading to diverted payments
Frequent voided sales transactions just before end of shift
Use of multiple accounts to transfer funds in a circular pattern
Invoices approved without supporting documentation repeatedly
Customer accounts used to funnel money through rapid deposits and withdrawals
Same bank account used for multiple employees payroll payments
High-value purchases split into smaller transactions to avoid approval limits
Dormant account suddenly receiving large deposits followed by immediate transfers
Employee claimed mileage reimbursement for non-existent trips
